--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics/1-01-escape-velocity-ad-astra.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics
// FILE:      1-01-escape-velocity-ad-astra.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics/1-01-escape-velocity-ad-astra.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
// TRACK NO:   4
------------------------------------------------------------------
**LORE NOTE:**
The "Magnum Opus." Originally released as the B-Side of *The Warehouse Tapes*, this suite stands here as the monumental A-Side it was always meant to be.

This 15-minute progressive rock journey is Cassidy O'Connell's autobiography in four movements, charting her escape from the trauma of the 'Friction' trial ("The Cage") to the transcendence of total artistic freedom ("The Cosmos").

Known by fans simply as **"Ad Astra,"** the track features a distinct "mechanical cutoff" sound between Part II and Part III. This wasn't a studio effect; Ryan O'Connell physically pulled the plug on his guitar amplifier mid-recording to simulate the violent silence of a rocket's Main Engine Cutoff (MECO).

In the band's "Ironworks" canon, this track acts as a coded transmission broadcast from Port Telsus, sending safe navigational coordinates to resistance fighters hidden in The Weave.

**LYRICS:**

[Part I: The Cage]
(Whispered, over a dark, shimmering synth pad)
The walls are cold, the air is thin
The noise outside is closing in
A single light, a buzzing sound
Another day in the underground

I'm running from the face I see
The "victim-saint" they made of me
The "wholesome girl," so sad and worn
A "David" for their Goliath's scorn

This rage is just a heavy stone
A gravity I've outgrown
Shedding skin, shedding weight
Escaping from this world of hate

They loved the trial, the "family" torn
They loved the story, a new star born
But not from music, not from grace
From the "hot-chocolate-drinking" "angel face"

The "Shark" was right, the "nuke" went off
We won the battle, but at what cost?
We're "radioactive," we're "litigious"
We're just the joke, the "victim-saints"

(Slightly louder)
I'm trapped inside this "Wilderness"
This "Fortress" built on bitterness
This isn't freedom, this is a cell
This "righteous hell"...
This "righteous hell"...

[Part II: Ignition (Ad Astra)]
(The dark synth pad is suddenly cut by a rapid, driving analog synth sequencer. A pounding, 80s acoustic drum beat kicks in, locked with a driving bassline. Vocals become strong, clear, and melodic.)

I see a signal in the endless black
A single light, no turning back
The pull of the old world fades away
A new horizon, a new day

The countdown's running in my head
Ignoring all the things they said
The "Engine" roars, a crimson light
A pillar of fire in the night

The pressure builds, I'm pinned to the seat
My heart is pounding with the beat
The G-force pulling, a heavy stone
The last chain breaks, I'm not alone

(Chorus)
I'm climbing! Climbing!
Past the point of no return
I'm flying! Flying!
With a fire I let burn
Just a signal, a distant light
Burning through the endless night
Ad astra... (To the stars!)
Ad astra!

(Instrumental Break)
(A short, fast, synthesizer and guitar riff-heavy section. Pure 80s prog-rock energy.)

The sky is tearing at the seams
Awake now from their broken dreams
The "Stardust" is just a trail of dust
The "Stardust" is the thing I trust

The clouds are falling far below
A place of pain I used to know
The blue gives way to endless black
There is no thought of turning back

(Chorus)
I'm climbing! Climbing!
Past the point of no return
I'm flying! Flying!
With a fire I let burn
Just a signal, a distant light
Burning through the endless night
Ad astra... (To the stars!)
Ad astra!

[Part III: The Cosmos]
(The driving beat cuts off abruptly. Tempo slows to a crawl. Vast, sweeping synth pads take over.)

I'm floating now, the engine's off
The silence is a holy sound
The rage is gone, the fear is lost
In this new universe I've found

The "Cage" is just a distant star
A tiny light I left behind
I finally know just who you are
The other half of my own mind

(Ethereal, layered vocals swell)
I'm loved by the sun
I'm held by the void
An orbit just begun
A life not destroyed

I'm loved by the moon
I'm cradled by the black
My heart is back in tune
There is no turning back

And the stars are singing
A song I understand
I'm finally, finally
Reaching for your hand

(Instrumental Bridge)
(Music swells. A long, beautiful, melodic, and highly emotional electric guitar solo. Full of hope, not rage.)

(Ethereal, layered vocals return)
I see the colors of the nebula
A place I've only seen in dreams
The reds, the blues, the purples call
Flowing in majestic streams

This is the place I was meant to be
This is the "Stardust" that is me
The cosmos and the rocket's fire
My one, my only true desire

(Ethereal, layered vocals)
I'm loved by the sun
I'm held by the void
An orbit just begun
A life not destroyed

And the stars are singing
A song I understand
I'm finally, finally
Reaching for your hand

[Part IV: Re-entry (The New World)]
(Music slowly fades back to just the shimmering synth pads and ethereal, whispered vocals)

The walls are gone
The air is clear
There is no noise
There is no fear

The "Stardust" is a forgotten ghost
The "Engine" has delivered me to the coast
Of a new world, a new shore
A place I've never been before

The "Cage" is broken, the "Victim-Saint" is dead
A new, clean script is in my head
The "Friction" burned away in the fire
Leaving only my true desire

(Ethereal, layered vocals swell for the finale)
I'm loved by the sun...
I'm held by the void...
My orbit has begun...
My life is not destroyed...

Ad astra...
Ad astra...
(To the stars...)

(Song fades out on a final, sustained, peaceful synthesizer chord)


--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics/1-02-escape-velocity-ad-astra-radio-edit.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics
// FILE:      1-02-escape-velocity-ad-astra-radio-edit.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics/1-02-escape-velocity-ad-astra-radio-edit.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
// TRACK NO:   10
------------------------------------------------------------------
**LORE NOTE:**
The "Trojan Horse" edit. Knowing that mainstream radio would never play a 15-minute prog-rock suite, the band (at Holly's insistence) cut this condensed 5-minute version for the promo CD.

It strips away the extended ambient transitions and long instrumental solos, focusing purely on the core narrative arc from "The Cage" to "Re-entry." While die-hard "Ironheads" consider it incomplete, this is the version that actually charted, introducing millions of new fans to the band's "Freedom Era" sound.

**LYRICS:**

[Part I: The Cage]
(Whispered, over a dark, shimmering synth pad)
The walls are cold, the air is thin
The noise outside is closing in
I'm running from the face I see
The "victim-saint" they made of me
This rage is just a heavy stone
A gravity I've outgrown
Shedding skin, shedding weight
Escaping from this world of hate

[Part II: Ignition (Ad Astra)]
(A driving, 80s analog synth sequencer starts, bass and drums kick in)
(Vocals become strong and melodic)
I see a light in the endless black
A signal calling, no turning back
The pull of the old world fades away
A new horizon, a new day

(Chorus)
(Full band, soaring ethereal vocals)
I'm climbing, climbing
Past the point of no return
I'm flying, flying
With a fire I let burn
Just a signal, a distant light
Burning through the endless night
Ad astra... (To the stars!)

[Part III: The Cosmos (Loved by the Sun)]
(Music becomes vast, atmospheric, and beautiful. Grand, sweeping synth pads and melodic guitar)
I'm floating now, the engine's off
The silence is a holy sound
The rage is gone, the fear is lost
In this new universe I've found

I'm loved by the sun
I'm held by the void
An orbit just begun
A life not destroyed
And the stars are singing
A song I understand
I'm finally, finally
Reaching for your hand

(Instrumental Bridge)
(A long, melodic, soaring electric guitar solo, full of emotion and hope)

[Part IV: Re-entry (The New World)]
(Music slowly fades back to just the shimmering synth pads and ethereal, whispered vocals)
The walls are gone
The air is clear
There is no noise
There is no fear
Ad astra...
Ad astra...
(fades out)


--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics/1-03-atmosphere-warehouse-demo.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics
// FILE:      1-03-atmosphere-warehouse-demo.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics/1-03-atmosphere-warehouse-demo.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
// TRACK NO:   16
------------------------------------------------------------------
**LORE NOTE:**
The "Lost Gem" from the canceled 1992 *Friction* sessions. The band wrote this song about the literal, scientific friction of a space shuttle re-entering Earth's atmosphere ("Here comes the friction / Feel the fire"). The "rogue" executive, Julian Vance, misinterpreted these lyrics as sexual metaphors, leading to the catastrophic misunderstanding that destroyed the contract. This is the original 1992 demo, released here for the first time.

**LYRICS:**

(Verse 1)
Black velvet, a million lights
Floating silent through the endless night
The world below, a sleeping blue
I'm holding my breath, I'm thinking of you

(Verse 2)
The signal's given, the turn is made
The point of no return, the price is paid
The fragile hull begins to shake
A promise that we're bound to make

(Chorus)
Here comes the friction, feel the fire
Burning up with our desire
A sheet of flame, a crimson glow
The only way we know to go
We're coming home, we're breaking through
This atmosphere... with you

(Verse 3)
The pressure builds, the gauges scream
This is the violence of the dream
A single tear in the metal skin
Is all it takes to let the outside in

(Chorus)
Here comes the friction, feel the fire
Burning up with our desire
A sheet of flame, a crimson glow
The only way we know to go
We're coming home, we're breaking through
This atmosphere... with you

(Bridge)
We're losing control, the edges blur
A terror and a beauty...
Burning up!

(Guitar Solo)

(Chorus)
Here comes the friction, feel the fire
Burning up with our desire
A sheet of flame, a crimson glow
The only way we know to go
We're coming home, we're breaking through
This atmosphere... with you

(Outro)
Burning up...
Friction...
Coming home...
(fades)


--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics/1-04-the-fortress.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics
// FILE:      1-04-the-fortress.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-ad-astra-single/lyrics/1-04-the-fortress.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
// TRACK NO:   22
------------------------------------------------------------------
**LORE NOTE:**
The epic closer of Side A. This arena-rock anthem is dedicated to the "Ironheads" and CPI alumni who funded the band's freedom through the "Forger Nation War Chest." The "Fortress" is both their warehouse studio and the protective wall their fans built around them.

**LYRICS:**

(Verse 1)
The world was burning, the lies were loud
We were the joke in the tabloid crowd
We had no shelter, we had no home
Just the open road, and a telephone

(Chorus)
But you, you built a fortress
You gave us walls when we were torn
You built a place to hide from the storm
You are the "Ironheads"!
You are the shield!
The only army that would not yield!
This is our fortress!

(Verse 2)
This isn't L.A., this isn't a dream
This is a warehouse, this is a scream
We're building our truth, we're building our sound
Right here on our hallowed ground

(Chorus)
'Cause you, you built a fortress
You gave us walls when we were torn
You built a place to hide from the storm
You are the "Ironheads"!
You are the shield!
The only army that would not yield!
This is our fortress!

(Guitar Solo)

(Outro)
Our fortress...
Our home...
We are the Forgers!
(fades out)

--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-01-static.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics
// FILE:      1-01-static.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-01-static.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
// TRACK NO:   4
------------------------------------------------------------------
**LORE NOTE:**
The opening statement of the "Freedom Era." Recorded in the warehouse with amps turned to 11, this track acts as a direct rejection of the "hollow sound" Apex forced the band to make for five years. The line "I am the static! I am the noise!" became the rallying cry for the "Ironhead" fanbase during the band's independent rebirth.

**LYRICS:**

(Verse 1)
You wanted pop, you wanted clean
A hollow sound from a thin machine
You tried to tune me out, you tried to change the dial
But I've been waiting all this while

(Chorus)
I am the static! I am the noise!
The signal breaking, the hidden voice
I am the static!
The feedback wail!
The story that you tried to derail!

(Verse 2)
This isn't synth-pop, this isn't grace
This is the sound of a different place
This is the heart you tried to hide
The part of us that never died

(Chorus)
I am the static! I am the noise!
The signal breaking, the hidden voice
I am the static!
The feedback wail!
The story that you tried to derail!

(Guitar Solo)

(Chorus)
I am the static! I am the noise!
The signal breaking, the hidden voice
I am the static!
The feedback wail!
The story that you tried to derail!

(Outro)
I am the static...
I am the static...
Can you hear me now?


--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-02-garbage.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics
// FILE:      1-02-garbage.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-02-garbage.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
// TRACK NO:   10
------------------------------------------------------------------
**LORE NOTE:**
Ryan's raw, "jangle-rock" rage track. It retells the infamous "dirty mirror" incident from the 1992 *Friction* photo shoot, where an executive tried to offer him cocaine on a mirror, and Ryan—innocently thinking it was dirt—wiped it clean with a napkin. The song channels his fury at the executive who humiliated him and tried to destroy his family.

**LYRICS:**

(Verse 1)
You brought your tray, your silver plate
You thought you'd open up the gate
You showed me powder on a glass
You thought you had a man of class

(Chorus)
It was just dust! It was just a lie!
So I wiped it clean, and I watched you die
You called it 'art', you called it 'style'
It was just garbage in a filthy pile!

(Verse 2)
You held your clipboard like a gun
You thought the battle was already won
You crossed the line, you showed your hand
You'll never, ever understand

(Chorus)
It was just dust! It was just a lie!
So I wiped it clean, and I watched you die
You called it 'art', you called it 'style'
It was just garbage in a filthy pile!

(Guitar Solo)

(Chorus)
It was just dust! It was just a lie!
So I wiped it clean, and I watched you die
You called it 'art', 'cuz you're a fake
It was just garbage, make no mistake!


--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-03-not-your-saint.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics
// FILE:      1-03-not-your-saint.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-03-not-your-saint.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
// TRACK NO:   16
------------------------------------------------------------------
**LORE NOTE:**
After the "Tabloid Hell" of the 1994 trial, the media tried to paint Cassidy as a "Victim-Saint"—a fragile, broken doll. This fierce arena anthem is her rejection of that narrative. She is neither the "Stardust" pop star nor the "Victim" of the scandal; she is a rock musician standing on her own two feet.

**LYRICS:**

(Verse 1)
You put my name in flashing lights
You loved the story, you loved the fight
You called me 'pure', you called me 'clean'
Another part of your sick scene

(Chorus)
I am not your victim
I am not your saint
I'm the monster that you tried to paint
I am not your 'Stardust'
I am not your grace
I'm the one who's spitting in your face

(Verse 2)
You loved the trial, the 'family' torn
The 'wholesome' girl, so sad and worn
You never stopped to ask me
What I was fighting just to be

(Chorus)
I am not your victim
I am not your saint
I'm the monster that you tried to paint
I am not your 'Stardust'
I am not your grace
I'm the one who's spitting in your face

(Bridge)
I'm not a victim...
I'm not a saint...
I am a weapon!

(Guitar Solo)

(Chorus)
I am not your victim
I am not your saint
I'm the monster that you tried to paint
I am not your 'Stardust'
I am not your grace
I'm the one who's spitting in your face


--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-04-atmosphere-warehouse-demo.md ---

--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-05-the-fortress.md ---

--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-06-escape-velocity-ad-astra.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics
// FILE:      1-06-escape-velocity-ad-astra.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1995-the-warehouse-tapes/lyrics/1-06-escape-velocity-ad-astra.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
// TRACK NO:   34
------------------------------------------------------------------
**LORE NOTE:**
The "Magnum Opus" that consumes the entirety of Side B. This 15-minute progressive rock suite is Cassidy O'Connell's autobiographical journey from the trauma of the trial ("The Cage") to the transcendence of artistic freedom ("The Cosmos").

Known by fans simply as **"Ad Astra,"** the track features a distinct "mechanical cutoff" sound between Part II and Part III, created by Ryan pulling the plug on his guitar amp to simulate a rocket's Main Engine Cutoff (MECO).

**LYRICS:**

[Part I: The Cage]
(Whispered, over a dark, shimmering synth pad)
The walls are cold, the air is thin
The noise outside is closing in
A single light, a buzzing sound
Another day in the underground

I'm running from the face I see
The "victim-saint" they made of me
The "wholesome girl," so sad and worn
A "David" for their Goliath's scorn

This rage is just a heavy stone
A gravity I've outgrown
Shedding skin, shedding weight
Escaping from this world of hate

They loved the trial, the "family" torn
They loved the story, a new star born
But not from music, not from grace
From the "hot-chocolate-drinking" "angel face"

The "Shark" was right, the "nuke" went off
We won the battle, but at what cost?
We're "radioactive," we're "litigious"
We're just the joke, the "victim-saints"

(Slightly louder)
I'm trapped inside this "Wilderness"
This "Fortress" built on bitterness
This isn't freedom, this is a cell
This "righteous hell"...
This "righteous hell"...

[Part II: Ignition (Ad Astra)]
(The dark synth pad is suddenly cut by a rapid, driving analog synth sequencer. A pounding, 80s acoustic drum beat kicks in, locked with a driving bassline. Vocals become strong, clear, and melodic.)

I see a signal in the endless black
A single light, no turning back
The pull of the old world fades away
A new horizon, a new day

The countdown's running in my head
Ignoring all the things they said
The "Engine" roars, a crimson light
A pillar of fire in the night

The pressure builds, I'm pinned to the seat
My heart is pounding with the beat
The G-force pulling, a heavy stone
The last chain breaks, I'm not alone

(Chorus)
I'm climbing! Climbing!
Past the point of no return
I'm flying! Flying!
With a fire I let burn
Just a signal, a distant light
Burning through the endless night
Ad astra... (To the stars!)
Ad astra!

(Instrumental Break)
(A short, fast, synthesizer and guitar riff-heavy section. Pure 80s prog-rock energy.)

The sky is tearing at the seams
Awake now from their broken dreams
The "Stardust" is just a trail of dust
The "Stardust" is the thing I trust

The clouds are falling far below
A place of pain I used to know
The blue gives way to endless black
There is no thought of turning back

(Chorus)
I'm climbing! Climbing!
Past the point of no return
I'm flying! Flying!
With a fire I let burn
Just a signal, a distant light
Burning through the endless night
Ad astra... (To the stars!)
Ad astra!

[Part III: The Cosmos]
(The driving beat cuts off abruptly. Tempo slows to a crawl. Vast, sweeping synth pads take over.)

I'm floating now, the engine's off
The silence is a holy sound
The rage is gone, the fear is lost
In this new universe I've found

The "Cage" is just a distant star
A tiny light I left behind
I finally know just who you are
The other half of my own mind

(Ethereal, layered vocals swell)
I'm loved by the sun
I'm held by the void
An orbit just begun
A life not destroyed

I'm loved by the moon
I'm cradled by the black
My heart is back in tune
There is no turning back

And the stars are singing
A song I understand
I'm finally, finally
Reaching for your hand

(Instrumental Bridge)
(Music swells. A long, beautiful, melodic, and highly emotional electric guitar solo. Full of hope, not rage.)

(Ethereal, layered vocals return)
I see the colors of the nebula
A place I've only seen in dreams
The reds, the blues, the purples call
Flowing in majestic streams

This is the place I was meant to be
This is the "Stardust" that is me
The cosmos and the rocket's fire
My one, my only true desire 
I'm loved by the sun

(Ethereal, layered vocalization)

[Part IV: Re-entry (The New World)]
(Music slowly fades back to just the shimmering synth pads and ethereal, whispered vocals)

The walls are gone
The air is clear
There is no noise
There is no fear

The "Stardust" is a forgotten ghost
The "Engine" has delivered me to the coast
Of a new world, a new shore
A place I've never been before

The "Cage" is broken, the "Victim-Saint" is dead
A new, clean script is in my head
The "Friction" burned away in the fire
Leaving only my true desire

(Ethereal, layered vocals swell for the finale)
I'm loved by the sun...
I'm held by the void...
My orbit has begun...
My life is not destroyed...

Ad astra...
Ad astra...
(To the stars...)

(Song fades out on a final, sustained, peaceful synthesizer chord)

--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1997-hard-reset/lyrics/1-01-hard-reset.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1997-hard-reset/lyrics
// FILE:      1-01-hard-reset.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-stardust-engine/1997-hard-reset/lyrics/1-01-hard-reset.md
// ALBUM INFO:  -  ()
------------------------------------------------------------------
LORE NOTE:
The opening statement of the "Freedom Era." While The Warehouse Tapes (1995) was a raw "bat signal" to the fans, Hard Reset (1997) was a professional declaration. This track serves as the direct narrative sequel to the 1995 epic Escape Velocity (Ad Astra).

Where Ad Astra ended with the ship clearing the atmosphere, Hard Reset begins with the terrifying silence of space. The main engines have cut out, and the crew realizes they must manually reboot the ship's core to stabilize their orbit. It is a metaphor for the band's own journey: they escaped the gravity of Apex Records, but now they must survive the vacuum of independence.

LYRICS:
[Intro]
(A deep, resonant bass thrum starts the track—like a massive engine idling. A high-pitched telemetry bleep repeats in time. Then, a heavy, driving drum fill kicks in.)

[Verse 1]
The G-force fades, the shaking stops
We're floating past the mountain tops
The old computer's dead and gone
We're running on the break of dawn

[Verse 2]
The screens are black, the air is still
We're drifting on a silent hill
Engage the manual override
There's nowhere left for us to hide

[Verse 3]
They said we'd burn, they said we'd break
That freedom was a huge mistake
But look at how the gauges glow
We're generating our own flow

[Verse 4]
I see the nebula ahead
A path where angels fear to tread
The Stardust isn't just a name
It's fuel for the Engine's flame

[Pre-Chorus]
Thrusters? Ready
Vector? Steady
We have to jump the spark
To light up the dark!

[Chorus]
Hard Reset!
Flip the switch and clear the cache
We’re rising from the static crash
Hard Reset!
The code is new, the core is bright
We’re burning through the edge of night
No ground control!
No gravity!
Just the Engine and the Galaxy!
Hard Reset!

[Bridge]
Stabilizing...
Synchronizing...
The hull is holding
The view is unfolding
SYSTEM... ONLINE!

[Guitar Solo](A soaring, melodic solo that mimics the feeling of zero-gravity flight. Lots of delay and chorus.)

[Chorus]
Hard Reset!
Flip the switch and clear the cache
We’re rising from the static crash
Hard Reset!
The code is new, the core is bright
We’re burning through the edge of night
No backup plan, no turning back
We’re the masters of this track!
HARD! RESET!

[Outro]
We are online
Course laid in
Let's fly
(Final power chord rings out, followed by the hum of a stable engine)

--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-winter-palace/2007-tales-from-the-solstice/names.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-winter-palace/2007-tales-from-the-solstice
// FILE:      names.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-winter-palace/2007-tales-from-the-solstice/names.md
------------------------------------------------------------------
**# 📘 **Rowlands Family: Old Names vs. New Names**

## **Mother**

|Old Name|New Name|Notes|
|---|---|---|
|**Ellen Hayes**|**Eira Rowlands**|“Ellen” was the placeholder before you established her Welsh identity. “Eira” (snow) reflects her Anglesey roots. “Rowlands” is her reclaimed maiden name after the divorce.|

## **Father**

|Old Name|New Name|Notes|
|---|---|---|
|**Tom Cross**|**Thomas Cross**|No name change — but “Thomas” is his formal name, and the source of Julian’s middle name.|

## **Children (Before the Julian Abduction Arc)**

All three children originally carry **Tom’s surname (Cross)**.

### **Gwendolyn**

|Old Name|New Name|Notes|
|---|---|---|
|**Gwendolyn Cross**|**Gwendolyn Arwen Rowlands**|First name stays. Middle name added: _Arwen_ (Welsh + LOTR resonance). Surname changes at age 18 by her own choice.|

### **Gabriel**

|Old Name|New Name|Notes|
|---|---|---|
|**Gabriel Cross**|**Gabriel Idris Rowlands**|First name stays. Middle name added: _Idris_ (fiery lord; Welsh mountain). Surname changes at age 18 by his own choice.|

### **Julian**

|Old Name|New Name|Notes|
|---|---|---|
|**Julian Cross**|**Julian Thomas Rowlands**|First name stays (named after Julian Lennon). Middle name “Thomas” inherited from Tom. Surname changed by court order after Tom’s death.|

# 🌟 **Summary (Quick Reference)**

### **Old → New**

- **Ellen Hayes → Eira Rowlands**
    
- **Tom Cross → Thomas Cross** (unchanged)
    
- **Gwendolyn Cross → Gwendolyn Arwen Rowlands**
    
- **Gabriel Cross → Gabriel Idris Rowlands**
    
- **Julian Cross → Julian Thomas Rowlands****

--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-winter-palace/2007-tales-from-the-solstice/upon-this-winters-night-all-languages.md ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/artists/the-winter-palace/2007-tales-from-the-solstice
// FILE:      upon-this-winters-night-all-languages.md
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/artists/the-winter-palace/2007-tales-from-the-solstice/upon-this-winters-night-all-languages.md
------------------------------------------------------------------
# Song Names:
* English: Upon This Winter's Night
* Welsh (Cymraeg): Ar Noson y Gaeaf Hon
* French (Québécois): En Cette Nuit d'Hiver
* Trilingual Version: Upon This Winter's Night (The Family Mix) — Though if they were to list all three titles on a private cassette tape for the house, it would read: Upon This Winter's Night / Ar Noson y Gaeaf Hon / En Cette Nuit d'Hiver.

# The 1997 Studio Sessions
Only the English version is ever recorded.

# 1. The English Version
[Intro] 
(Sudden, heavy driving cello riff enters)
(Concussive rock drum kit and distorted rhythm guitar crash in)

[Verse 1]
(symphonic rock music backs off to allow glockenspiel to take over the melody)
The clock upon the mantel chimes
Reminding me of better times
The window pane is frosted white
I'm searching for a sign tonight

[Pre-Chorus]
(Strings build tension, symphonic rock slowly kicks back in)
Can you hear me calling?
Can you see the glow?
Through the miles of silence
And the drifting snow?

[Chorus]
(Symphonic Rock detonates with full authority back in at the word Candle)
So keep a candle burning bright
Upon this winter's night 
hough you've wandered far and wide
Time remains upon your side
Follow the star, follow the light
And make it home tonight (Make it home tonight!)

[Instrumental Break]
(Dramatic Cello Solo)

[Verse 2]
The world is cold and full of fear
But sanctuary waits in here
Don't let the shadows steal your way
Don't listen to the words they say
The journey’s hard, the road is steep
But promises are yours to keep
So lift your head and face the wind
And let the journey home begin

[Chorus]
So keep a candle burning bright
Upon this winter's night
Though you've wandered far and wide
Time remains upon your side
Follow the star, follow the light
And make it home tonight

[Bridge]
(Tempo speeds up - Rock Opera style)
(Male Lead) I’m sending out a prayer!
(Choir) (Bring him home! Bring him home!)
(Male Lead) To vanish all despair!
(Choir) (You are not alone!)
(Male Lead) No matter where you are No matter how far!
(Male Lead) Just look to the Northern Star!

[Guitar Solo]
(Soaring, melodic electric guitar solo with orchestral backing)

[Chorus]
So keep a candle burning bright
Upon this winter's night
Though you've wandered far and wide
Time remains upon your side
Follow the star, follow the light
And make it home tonight

[Outro]
Make it home tonight...
(Follow the light...)
Make it home tonight...
(Upon this winter's night...)

[Big Finish]
(Orchestral hit) (Symphonic Rock gives way to a music box that is reminiscent of Johannes Brahms's Wiegenlied to finish the song)

# 2. The Welsh Version (Fersiwn Gymraeg)
[Intro]
(Sudden, heavy driving cello riff enters)
(Concussive rock drum kit and distorted rhythm guitar crash in)

[Verse 1]
(symphonic rock music backs off to allow glockenspiel to take over the melody)
Mae cloc y fantell yn canu
Yn fy atgoffa o amseroedd gwell
Mae cwarel y ffenestr yn wyn gan farug
Rwy'n chwilio am arwydd heno

[Pre-Chorus]
(Strings build tension, symphonic rock slowly kicks back in)
A allwch chi fy nghlywed i'n galw?
A allwch chi weld y tywynnu?
Drwy'r filltiroedd o dawelwch
A'r eira sy'n chwythu?

[Chorus]
(Symphonic Rock detonates with full authority back in at the word Candle)
Felly cadwch gannwyll yn llosgi'n llachar
Ar noson y gaeaf hon
Er i chi grwydro'n bell ac eang
Mae amser yn aros ar eich ochr
Dilynwch y seren, dilynwch y golau
A dewch adref heno (Dewch adref heno!)

[Instrumental Break]
(Dramatic Cello Solo)

[Verse 2]
Mae'r byd yn oer ac yn llawn ofn
Ond mae noddfa yn aros yma
Peidiwch â gadael i'r cysgodion ddwyn eich ffordd
Peidiwch â gwrando ar y geiriau maen nhw'n eu dweud
Mae'r daith yn anodd, mae'r ffordd yn serth
Ond mae addewidion yn eiddo i chi i'w cadw
Felly codwch eich pen ac wynebwch y gwynt
A gadewch i'r daith adref ddechrau

[Chorus]
Felly cadwch gannwyll yn llosgi'n llachar
Ar noson y gaeaf hon
Er i chi grwydro'n bell ac eang
Mae amser yn aros ar eich ochr
Dilynwch y seren, dilynwch y golau
A dewch adref heno

[Bridge]
(Tempo speeds up - Rock Opera style)
(Male Lead) Rwy'n anfon gweddi!
(Choir) (Dewch ag ef adref! Dewch ag ef adref!)
(Male Lead) I ddiflannu pob anobaith!
(Choir) (Nid ydych chi ar eich pen eich hun!)
(Male Lead) Ni waeth ble rydych chi, ni waeth pa mor bell!
(Male Lead) Edrychwch tuag at y Seren y Gogledd!

[Guitar Solo]
(Soaring, melodic electric guitar solo with orchestral backing)

[Chorus]
Felly cadwch gannwyll yn llosgi'n llachar
Ar noson y gaeaf hon
Er i chi grwydro'n bell ac eang
Mae amser yn aros ar eich ochr
Dilynwch y seren, dilynwch y golau
A dewch adref heno

[Outro]
Dewch adref heno...
(Dilynwch y golau...)
Dewch adref heno...
(Ar noson y gaeaf hon...)

[Big Finish]
(Orchestral hit) (Symphonic Rock gives way to a music box that is reminiscent of Johannes Brahms's Wiegenlied to finish the song)

# 3. The French Version (Version Française)
[Intro]
(Sudden, heavy driving cello riff enters)
(Concussive rock drum kit and distorted rhythm guitar crash in)

[Verse 1]
(symphonic rock music backs off to allow glockenspiel to take over the melody)
L'horloge sur le manteau résonne
Me rappelant des jours meilleurs
La vitre est givrée de blanc
Je cherche un signe ce soir

[Pre-Chorus]
(Strings build tension, symphonic rock slowly kicks back in)
M'entends-tu appeler ?
Peux-tu voir la lueur ?
À travers les kilomètres de silence
Et la neige qui dérive ?

[Chorus]
(Symphonic Rock detonates with full authority back in at the word Candle)
Alors garde une bougie allumée
En cette nuit d'hiver
Bien que tu aies erré si loin
Le temps reste de ton côté
Suis l'étoile, suis la lumière
Et rentre à la maison ce soir (Rentre à la maison ce soir !)

[Instrumental Break]
(Dramatic Cello Solo)

[Verse 2]
Le monde est froid et plein de peur
Mais un sanctuaire t'attend ici
Ne laisse pas les ombres voler ton chemin
N'écoute pas les mots qu'ils disent
Le voyage est dur, la route est abrupte
Mais les promesses t'appartiennent
Alors lève la tête et affronte le vent
Et que le voyage de retour commence

[Chorus]
Alors garde une bougie allumée
En cette nuit d'hiver
Bien que tu aies erré si loin
Le temps reste de ton côté
Suis l'étoile, suis la lumière
Et rentre à la maison ce soir

[Bridge]
(Tempo speeds up - Rock Opera style)
(Male Lead) J'envoie une prière !
(Choir) (Ramenez-le ! Ramenez-le !)
(Male Lead) Pour chasser tout désespoir !
(Choir) (Tu n'es pas seul !)
(Male Lead) Peu importe où tu es, peu importe la distance !
(Male Lead) Regarde juste l'Étoile du Nord !

[Guitar Solo]
(Soaring, melodic electric guitar solo with orchestral backing)

[Chorus]
Alors garde une bougie allumée
En cette nuit d'hiver
Bien que tu aies erré si loin
Le temps reste de ton côté
Suis l'étoile, suis la lumière
Et rentre à la maison ce soir

[Outro]
Rentre à la maison ce soir...
(Suis la lumière...)
Rentre à la maison ce soir...
(En cette nuit d'hiver...)

[Big Finish]
(Orchestral hit) (Symphonic Rock gives way to a music box that is reminiscent of Johannes Brahms's Wiegenlied to finish the song)

# 4. The Trilingual Version (The Family Mix)
This arrangement begins with the ultimate safety of Julian's anchor language (Welsh) when the song is at its most fragile, transitions through Gwendolyn's tactical French, and drops into the massive English anthems for the radio-style choruses.

[Intro]
(Sudden, heavy driving cello riff enters)
(Concussive rock drum kit and distorted rhythm guitar crash in)

[Verse 1]
(symphonic rock music backs off to allow glockenspiel to take over the melody)
Mae cloc y fantell yn canu (The clock upon the mantel chimes)
Yn fy atgoffa o amseroedd gwell (Reminding me of better times)
Mae cwarel y ffenestr yn wyn gan farug (The window pane is frosted white)
Rwy'n chwilio am arwydd heno (I'm searching for a sign tonight)

[Pre-Chorus]
(Strings build tension, symphonic rock slowly kicks back in)
M'entends-tu appeler ? (Can you hear me calling?)
Peux-tu voir la lueur ? (Can you see the glow?)
À travers les kilomètres de silence (Through the miles of silence)
Et la neige qui dérive ? (And the drifting snow?)

[Chorus]
(Symphonic Rock detonates with full authority back in at the word Candle)
So keep a candle burning bright
Upon this winter's night
Though you've wandered far and wide
Time remains upon your side
Follow the star, follow the light
And make it home tonight (Make it home tonight!)

[Instrumental Break]
(Dramatic Cello Solo)

[Verse 2]
Le monde est froid et plein de peur (The world is cold and full of fear)
Mais un sanctuaire t'attend ici (But sanctuary waits in here)
Peidiwch â gadael i'r cysgodion ddwyn eich ffordd (Don't let the shadows steal your way)
Peidiwch â gwrando ar y geiriau maen nhw'n eu dweud (Don't listen to the words they say)
The journey’s hard, the road is steep
But promises are yours to keep
So lift your head and face the wind
And let the journey home begin

[Chorus]
(Sung entirely in Welsh to honor the mother's roots for the second massive hit)
Felly cadwch gannwyll yn llosgi'n llachar
Ar noson y gaeaf hon
Er i chi grwydro'n bell ac eang
Mae amser yn aros ar eich ochr
Dilynwch y seren, dilynwch y golau
A dewch adref heno

[Bridge]
(Tempo speeds up - Rock Opera style)
(Male Lead) I’m sending out a prayer!
(Choir) (Ramenez-le ! Ramenez-le !) (Bring him home!)
(Male Lead) To vanish all despair!
(Choir) (Nid ydych chi ar eich pen eich hun!) (You are not alone!)
(Male Lead) No matter where you are, no matter how far!
(Male Lead) Just look to the Northern Star!

[Guitar Solo]
(Soaring, melodic electric guitar solo with orchestral backing)

[Chorus]
So keep a candle burning bright
Upon this winter's night
Though you've wandered far and wide
Time remains upon your side
Follow the star, follow the light
And make it home tonight

[Outro]
(Weaving all three languages together)
Make it home tonight...
(Dilynwch y golau...) (Follow the light)
Rentre à la maison ce soir... (Make it home tonight)
(Upon this winter's night...)

[Big Finish]
(Orchestral hit) (Symphonic Rock gives way to a music box that is reminiscent of Johannes Brahms's Wiegenlied to finish the song)

    font-family: sans-serif;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

    text-decoration: none;

--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/js/stardust-player.js ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/engine-room-records/js
// FILE:      stardust-player.js
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/engine-room-records/js/stardust-player.js
------------------------------------------------------------------
/**
 * ============================================================================
 * THE STARDUST PLAYER ENGINE (v4.1 - WCAG Edition)
 * ============================================================================
 * UPDATED FOR ACCESSIBILITY:
 * 1. Live Regions: Track title now announces "Buffering" and Song Names.
 * 2. Aria-Current: Playlist rows now strictly identify the active track.
 * 3. Page Title: Browser tab updates to reflect playback state.
 */

(function() {
    // --- 1. GLOBAL STATE & CONFIGURATION ---
    let currentIndex = -1;       // Tracks the currently playing song index
    let currentBlobUrl = null;   // Holds the memory reference to the audio file
    
    // Playback Settings (Persisted in LocalStorage)
    const REPEAT_MODES = ['none', 'all', 'one', 'album'];
    let repeatMode = 'none';
    let isShuffle = false;

    // Load User Preferences
    try {
        const savedRepeat = localStorage.getItem('stardust_repeat_mode');
        if (REPEAT_MODES.includes(savedRepeat)) repeatMode = savedRepeat;
        const savedShuffle = localStorage.getItem('stardust_shuffle_mode');
        if (savedShuffle === 'true') isShuffle = true;
    } catch (e) {
        console.warn("LocalStorage access denied.");
    }

    // --- 2. DOM CACHE (Persistent Elements Only) ---
    // These elements exist in footer.php and are NEVER destroyed by Turbo.
    const dom = {
        player: document.getElementById('sticky-audio-player'),
        audio: document.getElementById('main-audio-element'),
        title: document.getElementById('player-track-title'),
        artist: document.getElementById('player-track-artist'),
        art: document.getElementById('player-album-art'),
        btnPrev: document.getElementById('player-prev'),
        btnNext: document.getElementById('player-next'),
        btnRepeat: document.getElementById('player-repeat'),
        btnShuffle: document.getElementById('player-shuffle'),
        btnLyrics: document.getElementById('player-lyrics'),
        btnClose: document.getElementById('btn-close-player'),
        modalElement: document.getElementById('lyricsModal'),
        modalTitle: document.getElementById('lyricsModalTitle'),
        modalContent: document.getElementById('lyricsContent')
    };

    let bsModal = null; // Bootstrap Modal Instance

    // ========================================================================
    // INITIALIZATION & EVENT LISTENERS
    // ========================================================================

    function initEngine() {
        if (!dom.player) return; // Safety check

        // WCAG FIX: Make the track title a Live Region so screen readers announce song changes/errors
        dom.title.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite');
        dom.title.setAttribute('aria-atomic', 'true');

        // Initialize Bootstrap Modal
        if (dom.modalElement) {
            bsModal = new bootstrap.Modal(dom.modalElement);
        }

        // Attach Persistent Controls (Footer Buttons)
        dom.btnPrev.onclick = () => { let idx = getNextIndex(-1); if(idx !== -1) loadTrack(idx); };
        dom.btnNext.onclick = () => { let idx = getNextIndex(1); if(idx !== -1) loadTrack(idx); };
        
        dom.btnRepeat.onclick = () => {
            const idx = REPEAT_MODES.indexOf(repeatMode);
            repeatMode = REPEAT_MODES[(idx + 1) % REPEAT_MODES.length];
            localStorage.setItem('stardust_repeat_mode', repeatMode);
            updateControlUI();
        };

        dom.btnShuffle.onclick = () => {
            isShuffle = !isShuffle;
            localStorage.setItem('stardust_shuffle_mode', isShuffle);
            updateControlUI();
        };

        dom.btnLyrics.onclick = () => openLyrics(dom.btnLyrics.getAttribute('data-title'), dom.btnLyrics.getAttribute('data-url'));
        
        dom.btnClose.onclick = () => {
            dom.audio.pause();
            dom.player.classList.add('d-none');
            // Reset page title on close
            document.title = dom.originalPageTitle || document.title;
        };

        // Auto-Advance Logic
        dom.audio.onended = () => {
            if(repeatMode === 'one') {
                dom.audio.currentTime = 0;
                dom.audio.play();
            } else {
                let idx = getNextIndex(1); 
                if(idx !== -1) loadTrack(idx); 
            }
        };
        
        // Store original title for restoration
        dom.originalPageTitle = document.title;
        
        updateControlUI();
    }

    // --- TURBO EVENT: PAGE LISTENERS ---
    // Runs every time a new page is rendered to attach clicks to the new tracklist.
    function bindPageEvents() {
        // 1. Play Buttons
        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-play-index').forEach(btn => {
            // Remove old listeners to be safe (though Turbo usually wipes them)
            const newBtn = btn.cloneNode(true);
            btn.parentNode.replaceChild(newBtn, btn);
            
            newBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                loadTrack(parseInt(newBtn.getAttribute('data-index')));
            });
        });

        // 2. Lyrics Buttons
        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-view-lyrics').forEach(btn => {
            const newBtn = btn.cloneNode(true);
            btn.parentNode.replaceChild(newBtn, btn);

            newBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                openLyrics(newBtn.getAttribute('data-title'), newBtn.getAttribute('data-url'));
            });
        });
        
        // 3. Highlight currently playing track (if it exists on this page)
        updateTracklistUI();
        
        // Update original title ref on navigation
        dom.originalPageTitle = document.title;
    }

    // --- TURBO EVENT: PLAYLIST HANDOFF ---
    // Triggered by _tracklist-downloader.php when a new album loads.
    document.addEventListener('stardust:playlist-update', (e) => {
        if(e.detail && e.detail.playlist) {
            window.STARDUST_PLAYLIST = e.detail.playlist;
            
            // If the player is currently hidden (idle), reset the UI to the new album's first track
            if (dom.player.classList.contains('d-none') && window.STARDUST_PLAYLIST.length > 0) {
                const first = window.STARDUST_PLAYLIST[0];
                dom.title.innerText = "Ready to Play";
                dom.artist.innerText = first.album; // Show Album Name as Artist initially
                dom.art.src = first.artwork;
                dom.player.classList.remove('d-none');
            }
            
            // Re-bind buttons for the new HTML
            bindPageEvents();
        }
    });

    // Run Once on Load
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        initEngine();
        bindPageEvents(); // Catch initial page load
    });

    // Run on every Turbo Navigation
    document.addEventListener('turbo:load', bindPageEvents);


    // ========================================================================
    // CORE LOGIC ENGINE
    // ========================================================================

    function getNextIndex(direction = 1) {
        const playlist = window.STARDUST_PLAYLIST || [];
        if (playlist.length === 0) return -1;

        if (isShuffle && repeatMode !== 'one') return getRandomIndex();
        if (repeatMode === 'one') return currentIndex;

        if (repeatMode === 'album') {
            const currentTrack = playlist[currentIndex];
            // Simple filter for same album
            const albumIndices = playlist.map((t, i) => (t.album === currentTrack.album ? i : -1)).filter(i => i !== -1);
            let internalPos = albumIndices.indexOf(currentIndex) + direction;
            if (internalPos >= albumIndices.length) internalPos = 0;
            if (internalPos < 0) internalPos = albumIndices.length - 1;
            return albumIndices[internalPos];
        }

        let nextIndex = currentIndex + direction;
        if (repeatMode === 'all') {
            if (nextIndex >= playlist.length) nextIndex = 0;
            if (nextIndex < 0) nextIndex = playlist.length - 1;
        } else {
            if (nextIndex >= playlist.length || nextIndex < 0) nextIndex = -1;
        }
        return nextIndex;
    }

    function getRandomIndex() {
        const playlist = window.STARDUST_PLAYLIST || [];
        let newIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * playlist.length);
        if (newIndex === currentIndex && playlist.length > 1) {
            newIndex = (newIndex + 1) % playlist.length;
        }
        return newIndex;
    }

    // ========================================================================
    // PLAYBACK & UI
    // ========================================================================

    function updateTracklistUI() {
        // Reset all rows
        document.querySelectorAll('.track-row').forEach(row => {
            row.classList.remove('bg-primary', 'bg-opacity-25');
            // WCAG FIX: Remove the 'current' marker from inactive rows
            row.removeAttribute('aria-current');
            
            const icon = row.querySelector('.play-indicator');
            if(icon) icon.className = 'fa-duotone fa-play-circle fs-4 text-primary opacity-50 play-indicator';
        });

        // Highlight active row (if it exists on current page)
        const activeRow = document.getElementById('track-row-' + currentIndex);
        const playlist = window.STARDUST_PLAYLIST || [];
        const currentTrack = playlist[currentIndex];
        
        if(activeRow && currentTrack) {
            // Check if title matches (Weak check, but functional for UI)
            const rowTitle = activeRow.querySelector('strong').innerText;
            if (rowTitle.trim() === currentTrack.title.trim()) {
                 activeRow.classList.add('bg-primary', 'bg-opacity-25');
                 
                 // WCAG FIX: Mark this row as the 'current' item for screen readers
                 activeRow.setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');

                 const icon = activeRow.querySelector('.play-indicator');
                 if(icon) icon.className = 'spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-light play-indicator';
                 // If playing, change spinner to volume icon
                 if (!dom.audio.paused) {
                    if(icon) icon.className = 'fa-duotone fa-volume-high fs-4 text-white play-indicator';
                 }
            }
        }
    }

    window.loadTrack = function(index) {
        const playlist = window.STARDUST_PLAYLIST || [];
        if (index < 0 || index >= playlist.length) return;

        // Garbage Collection
        if (currentBlobUrl) {
            URL.revokeObjectURL(currentBlobUrl);
            currentBlobUrl = null;
        }

        currentIndex = index;
        const track = playlist[index];

        // UI Updates
        dom.player.classList.remove('d-none');
        
        // NOTE: Because we added aria-live='polite' in initEngine, 
        // this text change will be announced by the screen reader.
        dom.title.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary me-2" aria-hidden="true"></span>Buffering...`;
        
        if(dom.artist) dom.artist.textContent = track.artist;
        dom.art.src = track.artwork;
        
        dom.btnLyrics.setAttribute('data-title', track.title);
        dom.btnLyrics.setAttribute('data-url', track.lyrics);

        updateControlUI();
        updateTracklistUI();

        // Fetch & Play
        fetch(track.src)
            .then(res => {
                if(!res.ok) throw new Error(res.status);
                return res.blob();
            })
            .then(blob => {
                currentBlobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                dom.audio.src = currentBlobUrl;
                
                dom.title.textContent = track.title;
                
                // WCAG FIX: Update Browser Title so users know music is playing in this tab
                document.title = `▶ ${track.title} | ${dom.originalPageTitle}`;

                updateTracklistUI(); // Update icon from spinner to Volume

                dom.audio.load();
                dom.audio.play().catch(e => console.warn("Autoplay blocked:", e));
                
                // Media Session API
                if ('mediaSession' in navigator) {
                    navigator.mediaSession.metadata = new MediaMetadata({
                        title: track.title, 
                        artist: track.artist, 
                        album: track.album,
                        artwork: [{ src: track.artwork, sizes: '512x512', type: 'image/jpeg' }]
                    });
                    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('previoustrack', () => loadTrack(getNextIndex(-1)));
                    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('nexttrack', () => loadTrack(getNextIndex(1)));
                    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('play', () => dom.audio.play());
                    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('pause', () => dom.audio.pause());
                }
            })
            .catch(err => {
                console.error("Playback Error:", err);
                dom.title.innerHTML = `<span class="text-danger">Load Failed</span>`;
            });
    };

    function updateControlUI() {
        const rIcon = dom.btnRepeat.querySelector('i');
        dom.btnRepeat.className = 'btn btn-sm ' + (repeatMode === 'none' ? 'btn-outline-secondary' : 'btn-outline-primary active');
        
        // ARIA: Add Pressed state for toggles
        dom.btnRepeat.setAttribute('aria-pressed', repeatMode !== 'none');
        dom.btnShuffle.setAttribute('aria-pressed', isShuffle);

        if (repeatMode === 'one') rIcon.className = 'fa-solid fa-repeat-1';
        else if (repeatMode === 'album') rIcon.className = 'fa-duotone fa-compact-disc';
        else rIcon.className = 'fa-solid fa-repeat';
        
        dom.btnShuffle.className = 'btn btn-sm ' + (isShuffle ? 'btn-outline-primary active' : 'btn-outline-secondary');
        
        dom.btnPrev.disabled = (repeatMode !== 'all' && repeatMode !== 'album' && !isShuffle && currentIndex === 0);
        dom.btnNext.disabled = (repeatMode !== 'all' && repeatMode !== 'album' && !isShuffle && currentIndex === ((window.STARDUST_PLAYLIST || []).length - 1));
    }

    /**
     * FEATURE: openLyrics()
     * Fetches the Markdown (.md) lyrics file and converts it into styled HTML on the fly.
     * This handles custom headers like **LORE NOTE:**
     */
    window.openLyrics = function(title, url) {
        if (!bsModal) return; // Guard if modal missing

        // 1. Set Loading State
        dom.modalTitle.textContent = title;
        dom.modalContent.innerHTML = `
            <div class="text-center py-5">
                <div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status"></div>
                <p class="mt-2 font-monospace">Retrieving data from the Vault...</p>
            </div>`;
        
        bsModal.show();

        // 2. Fetch MD File (with cache busting ?v=timestamp to ensure fresh lore)
        fetch(url + "?v=" + Date.now())
            .then(response => {
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Lore file not found.");
                return response.text();
            })
            .then(text => {
                // 3. Parse Markdown
                // Sanitize HTML tags to prevent XSS
                let safeText = text.replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
                
                // Split file by double newlines (paragraphs)
                let blocks = safeText.split(/\n\s*\n/);

                // Process each block
                let htmlOutput = blocks.map(block => {
                    let lines = block.trim().split(/\n/);
                    if (lines.length === 0) return '';

                    let headerHtml = '';
                    let contentLines = lines;
                    let firstLine = lines[0].trim();

                    // Detect "**HEADER:**" pattern (e.g., **LORE NOTE:**)
                    if (firstLine.match(/^\*\*[A-Z ]+:\*\*$/)) {
                        let cleanHeader = firstLine.replace(/\*\*/g, ''); // Strip stars
                        headerHtml = `<h4 class="text-warning fw-bold border-bottom border-secondary pb-2 mb-3 mt-2">${cleanHeader}</h4>`;
                        contentLines = lines.slice(1); // Remove header from body
                    }
                    // Detect "[Section Header]" pattern (e.g., [Chorus])
                    else if (firstLine.match(/^[\(\[].*?[\)\]]$/)) {
                        headerHtml = `<h5 class="text-info fw-bold text-uppercase mb-2 mt-2">${firstLine}</h5>`;
                        contentLines = lines.slice(1);
                    }

                    // Bold specific text within lines
                    let processedBody = contentLines.map(line => {
                        return line.replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong class="text-body fw-bold">$1</strong>');
                    });

                    if (contentLines.length === 0) return `<div class="mb-4">${headerHtml}</div>`;

                    return `
                        <div class="lyrics-block mb-4">
                            ${headerHtml}
                            <div style="line-height: 1.6;">${processedBody.join('<br>')}</div>
                        </div>`;
                }).join('');

                // 4. Render
                dom.modalContent.innerHTML = `<div class="p-3">${htmlOutput}</div>`;
            })
            .catch(err => {
                dom.modalContent.innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-warning m-3">Data Corrupted. Unable to retrieve lyrics.</div>`;
            });
    };

})();

    /* Default (Light Mode): 
       'Multiply' makes the white background disappear, 
       leaving crisp black text. */
    mix-blend-mode: multiply; 
}

/* Dark Mode Override */
[data-bs-theme="dark"] .navbar-brand-corporate-img {
    /* Step 1: Invert colors (Black Text -> White Text, White Bg -> Black Bg) */
    filter: invert(1) grayscale(100%); 
    
    /* Step 2: 'Screen' makes the new Black background disappear,
       leaving crisp WHITE text. */
    mix-blend-mode: screen; 
}

// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/family/css/bootstrap
// FILE:      root.css
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/family/css/bootstrap/root.css
------------------------------------------------------------------
/* /raggiesoft/css/bootstrap/family/root.css */

/* --- 1. THE FAMILY PALETTE (Default/Light) --- */
:root {
    /* Michael (Architect) - Blue */
    --family-michael: #0d6efd;
    
    /* Paige (Editor/Safe Person) - Cyan/Teal */
    --family-paige: #0dcaf0;
    
    /* Jessica (Foundation) - Green */
    --family-jessica: #198754;
    
    /* Sarah (Guardian) - Yellow/Warning */
    --family-sarah: #ffc107;
    
    /* Harper (Studio) - Indigo/Purple (Dark for Light Mode) */
    --family-harper: #6610f2;
    
    /* Jenna (Dev Twin) - Orange */

}

    --bs-body-bg: #121212; 
    --bs-body-color: #dee2e6;
    --bs-body-bg-rgb: 18, 18, 18;
    
    /* Fix: Override Harper's purple to be lighter in Dark Mode for contrast */
    --family-harper: #d0bfff; 
    
    /* Glassmorphism Variables for Dark Mode */

    --glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);

    --bs-border-width: 2px;     /* Heavy, structural borders. */

/* safety-net.css - Industrial Standards */

/* 1. Font Stack */
/* Monospace Priority: The "Terminal" / "Manifest" aesthetic */
body {
    font-family: "Courier New", Courier, "Lucida Sans Typewriter", "Lucida Typewriter", monospace;
    font-size: 1.0rem; 
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* Headings: Stamped/Stencil feel */

    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* 2. Selection (Scanner Data) */
::selection {
    background: var(--bs-primary);
    color: #000;
}

/* 3. Scrollbar (The Conveyor Belt) */
/* Chrome/Safari/Edge */
::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 12px;
    background: #1a1a1a;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background-color: var(--bs-secondary);
    border: 2px solid #1a1a1a; /* Tracks */
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
    background-color: var(--bs-primary);
}

/* 4. Form Controls (Data Entry) */
.form-control {
    background-color: var(--bs-body-bg);
    border: 2px solid var(--bs-border-color);
    color: var(--bs-body-color);
    font-family: var(--bs-font-monospace);
    border-radius: 0;
}

.form-control:focus {
    background-color: #000;
    color: var(--bs-primary);
    border-color: var(--bs-primary);
    box-shadow: none; /* No soft glow, hard borders only */
}

/* 1. Navbar Base */
header .navbar {
    /* FIXED: Fallback is now White (#ffffff) to match root.css :root default.
       var(--bs-body-bg) will automatically switch this to #121212 in Dark Mode. */
    background-color: var(--bs-body-bg, #ffffff) !important;
    
    /* FIXED: Fallback is now Light Grey (#dee2e6) for visibility on white backgrounds. */
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #dee2e6) !important;
    
    transition: background-color 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease;
}

/* 2. Text Colors */
/* We use body-color variables so text automatically flips Black <-> White */
header .navbar-brand {
    color: var(--bs-body-color) !important;
}

header .nav-link {
    /* Use secondary color variable (Grey) */
    color: var(--bs-secondary) !important;
}

header .nav-link:hover,
header .nav-link.active {
    color: var(--bs-primary) !important;
}

/* 3. Hamburger Menu */
header .navbar-toggler {
    border-color: var(--bs-border-color) !important;
}
header .navbar-toggler .hamburger-bar {
    /* This ensures the bars are Black in Light Mode, White in Dark Mode */
    background-color: var(--bs-body-color) !important;
}

/* 4. Dropdowns */
header .dropdown-menu {
    background-color: var(--bs-body-bg) !important;
    border-color: var(--bs-border-color) !important;
}
header .dropdown-item {
    color: var(--bs-body-color) !important;
}
header .dropdown-item:hover {
    /* Uses tertiary-bg (defined in root.css) for the hover state */
    background-color: var(--bs-tertiary-bg, #f8f9fa) !important; 
    color: var(--bs-primary) !important;
}

/* 5. CORPORATE LOGO MAGIC */
/* This handles the Engine Room / Corporate JPG logos with white backgrounds */
.navbar-brand-corporate-img {
    /* Light Mode: Multiply makes the white background transparent */
    mix-blend-mode: multiply; 
}

/* Dark Mode Override */
[data-bs-theme="dark"] .navbar-brand-corporate-img {
    /* Dark Mode: Invert colors (White bg -> Black bg) then Screen (Black bg -> Transparent) */
    filter: invert(1) grayscale(100%); 
    mix-blend-mode: screen; 
}

    :root {
    /* --- Brand Palette --- */

    /* Bootstrap Mapping */
    --bs-primary: #42AADB;
    --bs-secondary: #6c757d;
    --bs-success: #198754;
    --bs-info: #0dcaf0;
    --bs-warning: #ffc107;
    --bs-danger: #dc3545;

    --bs-primary-rgb: 66, 170, 219;
    --bs-secondary-rgb: 108, 117, 125;
    --bs-success-rgb: 25, 135, 84;
    --bs-info-rgb: 13, 202, 240;
    --bs-warning-rgb: 255, 193, 7;
    --bs-danger-rgb: 220, 53, 69;
    --bs-light-rgb: 248, 249, 250;
    --bs-dark-rgb: 33, 37, 41;
    
    /* Corporate Light Base */
    --bs-body-bg: #ffffff;          /* Pure White Paper */
    --bs-body-color: #212529;       /* Standard Dark Grey */
    --bs-body-bg-rgb: 255, 255, 255;
    --bs-body-color-rgb: 33, 37, 41;

    --bs-link-color: #42AADB;
    --bs-link-hover-color: #258DBD;
    --bs-border-color: #dee2e6;
    --bs-border-color-translucent: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.175);
}

/* --- DARK MODE --- */
/* We apply these overrides to both the media query AND the data-attribute */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    :root {
        --bs-body-bg: #121212;      /* Corporate Dark */
        --bs-body-color: #e0e0e0;   /* Off-White Text */
        --bs-body-bg-rgb: 18, 18, 18;
        --bs-body-color-rgb: 224, 224, 224;

        --bs-border-color: #2c2c2c;
        --bs-secondary: #adb5bd;
        --bs-secondary-rgb: 173, 181, 189; /* Fix for text-muted contrast */
        
        --bs-link-color: #66c2ff;   /* Lighter blue for contrast */
        --bs-link-hover-color: #ffffff;
        --bs-tertiary-bg: #1f1f1f;

        /* ADAPTIVE RE-MAPPING for Dark Mode */
        /* This fixes "bg-white" and "bg-light" cards appearing white with light text */
        --bs-white: #1f1f1f; 
        --bs-white-rgb: 31, 31, 31;
        
        --bs-light: #2b3035;
        --bs-light-rgb: 43, 48, 53;

        /* Ensure utility colors (badges) stay visible */
        --bs-success: #198754;
        --bs-success-rgb: 25, 135, 84;
        
        --bs-warning: #ffc107;
        --bs-warning-rgb: 255, 193, 7;

        /* Force "text-dark" to actually be dark (for the yellow banner) */
        --bs-dark: #000000;
        --bs-dark-rgb: 0, 0, 0;
    }
}

[data-bs-theme="dark"] {
    --bs-body-bg: #121212;
    --bs-body-color: #e0e0e0;
    --bs-body-bg-rgb: 18, 18, 18;
    --bs-body-color-rgb: 224, 224, 224;

--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/portfolio/css/bootstrap/safety-net.css ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/portfolio/css/bootstrap
// FILE:      safety-net.css
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/portfolio/css/bootstrap/safety-net.css
------------------------------------------------------------------
/* safety-net-raggiesoft.css */
/* RaggieSoft Corporate Overrides */

/* 1. Enforce System Font Stack (Fast, Clean, Native) */
body {
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
}
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, .navbar-brand {
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em; /* Modern tight tracking */
}

/* 2. Fix Button Contrast */
/* RaggieSoft Blue is light, so text must be WHITE */
.btn-primary {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    background-color: var(--bs-primary);
    border-color: var(--bs-primary);
}
.btn-primary:hover,
.btn-primary:focus {
    background-color: var(--mpr-blue-600) !important;
    border-color: var(--mpr-blue-600) !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
}


--- START OF FILE raggiesoft-assets/portfolio/js/recruiter-gate.js ---
// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets/portfolio/js
// FILE:      recruiter-gate.js
// LIVE URL:  https://assets.raggiesoft.com/portfolio/js/recruiter-gate.js
------------------------------------------------------------------
// assets/portfolio/js/recruiter-gate.js
// The RaggieSoft "Recruiter Gate"
// Filters inquiries based on Resume, Location, and Salary.

// FIX: Support both Hard Refreshes and Turbo Navigation
function bootstrapGate() {
    // Prevent double-initialization if Turbo fires twice
    if (document.getElementById('gate-container').getAttribute('data-initialized') === 'true') return;
    initGate();
}

// 1. Initial Load (Hard Refresh)
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', bootstrapGate);

// 2. Turbo Navigation (Link Clicks)
document.addEventListener('turbo:load', bootstrapGate);

// Default Config (Overwritten by JSON)
let CONFIG = {
    minSalary: 75000,
    targetSalary: 85000,
    hourlyThreshold: 200,
    locationsJson: 'https://assets.raggiesoft.com/portfolio/json/locations.json',
    salaryJson: 'https://assets.raggiesoft.com/portfolio/json/salary.json',
    bookingUrl: null // Will be populated from salary.json if present
};

let locationsData = [];

async function initGate() {
    const container = document.getElementById('gate-container');
    if (!container) return;

    try {
        // Parallel Fetch: Get Locations AND Salary at the same time
        const [locResponse, salaryResponse] = await Promise.all([
            fetch(CONFIG.locationsJson),
            fetch(CONFIG.salaryJson)
        ]);

        locationsData = await locResponse.json();
        const salaryData = await salaryResponse.json();
        
        // Merge fetched salary data into CONFIG
        CONFIG = { ...CONFIG, ...salaryData };

    } catch (e) {
        console.error("Failed to load gate configuration", e);
        container.innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Error loading configuration. Please try refreshing the page.</div>`;
        return;
    }

    renderStep1();
}

// --- STEP 1: RESUME CHECK ---
function renderStep1() {
    const container = document.getElementById('gate-container');
    container.innerHTML = `
        <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 fade-in-up">
            <div class="card-body p-5 text-center">
                <div class="mb-4 text-secondary"><i class="fa-duotone fa-file-user fa-3x"></i></div>
                <h3 class="h4 fw-bold mb-3">Step 1: The Basics</h3>
                <p class="lead mb-4">Have you reviewed my resume and technical qualifications?</p>
                
                <div class="d-grid gap-3 d-sm-flex justify-content-center">
                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-lg px-5" onclick="handleResume('no')">No</button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-lg px-5" onclick="renderStep2()">Yes</button>
                </div>
                <div id="step1-feedback" class="mt-3"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
}

function handleResume(answer) {
    if (answer === 'no') {
        document.getElementById('step1-feedback').innerHTML = `
            <div class="alert alert-warning mt-3">
                <i class="fa-duotone fa-circle-exclamation me-2"></i>
                Please <a href="/about/michael-ragsdale/resume" class="alert-link">review my resume</a> first to ensure my skills match your needs.
            </div>`;
    }
}

// --- STEP 2: LOCATION CHECK ---
function renderStep2() {
    const container = document.getElementById('gate-container');
    
    // Build Options dynamically
    let optionsHtml = '<option value="" selected disabled>Select a Location...</option>';
    locationsData.forEach(loc => {
        optionsHtml += `<option value="${loc.value}">${loc.label}</option>`;
    });
    optionsHtml += '<option value="other">Other / Outside Virginia</option>';

    container.innerHTML = `
        <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 fade-in-up">
            <div class="card-body p-5 text-center">
                <div class="mb-4 text-success"><i class="fa-duotone fa-map-location-dot fa-3x"></i></div>
                <h3 class="h4 fw-bold mb-3">Step 2: Location</h3>
                <p class="mb-4">Where is this position located?</p>
                
                <div class="row justify-content-center">
                    <div class="col-md-8">
                        <select id="locationSelect" class="form-select form-select-lg mb-3">
                            ${optionsHtml}
                        </select>
                        <button class="btn btn-primary px-5 mt-2" onclick="handleLocation()">Next</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div id="step2-feedback" class="mt-3"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
}

function handleLocation() {
    const val = document.getElementById('locationSelect').value;
    const feedback = document.getElementById('step2-feedback');

    if (!val) {
        feedback.innerHTML = '<span class="text-danger">Please select a location.</span>';
        return;
    }

    if (val === 'other') {
        feedback.innerHTML = `
            <div class="alert alert-danger mt-3">
                <h5 class="alert-heading"><i class="fa-duotone fa-hand-palm me-2"></i>Out of Range</h5>
                <p class="mb-0">I am currently only accepting roles within <strong>Virginia</strong> (Remote or On-Site) to maintain my in-state tuition status at TCC.</p>
            </div>`;
        return;
    }

    if (val === 'relocate-va') {
        feedback.innerHTML = `
            <div class="alert alert-info mt-3">
                <i class="fa-duotone fa-circle-info me-2"></i>
                <strong>Note:</strong> Relocation within VA requires relocation assistance.
                <div class="mt-2"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-info" onclick="renderStep3()">Acknowledge & Continue</button></div>
            </div>`;
        return;
    }

    renderStep3();
}

// --- STEP 3: SALARY CHECK ---
function renderStep3() {
    const container = document.getElementById('gate-container');
    // Using neutral placeholder to avoid anchoring
    container.innerHTML = `
        <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 fade-in-up">
            <div class="card-body p-5 text-center">
                <div class="mb-4 text-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-sack-dollar fa-3x"></i></div>
                <h3 class="h4 fw-bold mb-3">Step 3: Compensation</h3>
                <p class="mb-4">What is the <strong>yearly base salary</strong> (W2)?</p>
                
                <div class="row justify-content-center">
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <div class="input-group input-group-lg mb-3">
                            <span class="input-group-text">$</span>
                            <input type="number" id="salaryInput" class="form-control" placeholder="Enter yearly amount">
                            <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="handleSalary()">Check</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div id="step3-feedback" class="mt-3"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
    
    document.getElementById('salaryInput').addEventListener('keypress', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') handleSalary();
    });
}

function handleSalary() {
    const input = document.getElementById('salaryInput').value;
    const amount = parseFloat(input.replace(/,/g, ''));
    const feedback = document.getElementById('step3-feedback');

    if (!amount || amount <= 0) {
        feedback.innerHTML = '<span class="text-danger">Please enter a valid number.</span>';
        return;
    }

    if (amount < CONFIG.minSalary) {
        feedback.innerHTML = `
            <div class="alert alert-danger mt-3 text-start">
                <div class="d-flex">
                    <div class="me-3 fs-1"><i class="fa-duotone fa-traffic-light-stop"></i></div>
                    <div>
                        <h5 class="alert-heading fw-bold">Out of Range</h5>
                        <p>Unfortunately, <strong>${formatMoney(amount)}</strong> is below my minimum requirement ($${formatMoney(CONFIG.minSalary)}). To respect your time, I must decline this opportunity.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>`;
    } else {
        revealContactInfo(amount);
    }
}

// --- STEP 4: SUCCESS / REVEAL ---
function revealContactInfo(salary) {
    const isTarget = salary >= CONFIG.targetSalary;
    const color = isTarget ? 'success' : 'primary';
    const container = document.getElementById('gate-container');

    // Logic: Do we have a Booking URL from the JSON?
    let actionArea = '';
    
    if (CONFIG.bookingUrl) {
        // OPTION A: Show Booking Button + Email Backup
        actionArea = `
            <div class="d-grid gap-3 d-sm-flex justify-content-center mb-4">
                <a href="${CONFIG.bookingUrl}" target="_blank" class="btn btn-${color} btn-lg px-5 py-3 fw-bold shadow-sm hover-lift">
                    <i class="fa-duotone fa-calendar-clock me-2"></i> Schedule Interview
                </a>
            </div>
            <div class="text-muted small mb-3">
                Prefer email? <a href="mailto:hireme@michaelpragsdale.com" class="text-decoration-none text-secondary fw-bold">hireme@michaelpragsdale.com</a>
            </div>
        `;
    } else {
        // OPTION B: Email Only (Fallback if Booking URL missing)
        actionArea = `
            <div class="bg-body-tertiary p-4 rounded border mb-4">
                <h5 class="text-secondary text-uppercase small fw-bold ls-1">Direct Contact</h5>
                <div class="fs-4 fw-bold mt-2">
                    <a href="mailto:hireme@michaelpragsdale.com?subject=Interview Request (Pre-Screened)" class="text-decoration-none">
                        hireme@michaelpragsdale.com
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="d-grid gap-2 d-sm-flex justify-content-center">
                <a href="mailto:hireme@michaelpragsdale.com" class="btn btn-${color} btn-lg px-4">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane me-2"></i> Send Email
                </a>
            </div>
        `;
    }

    container.innerHTML = `
        <div class="card shadow border-${color} fade-in-up">
            <div class="card-body p-5 text-center">
                <div class="mb-4 text-${color}"><i class="fa-duotone fa-unlock-keyhole fa-4x"></i></div>
                <h2 class="h3 fw-bold text-${color} mb-3">Access Granted</h2>
                <p class="lead mb-4">
                    Thank you for confirming alignment on location and compensation.<br>
                    My calendar is open for a preliminary discussion.
                </p>
                
                ${actionArea}

                <div class="mt-4 pt-3 border-top">
                     <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/michael-ragsdale-raggiesoft" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-link text-secondary text-decoration-none">
                        <i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin me-1"></i> View LinkedIn Profile
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
}

function formatMoney(num) {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD', maximumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(num);
}

    color: var(--bs-secondary) !important;
}

header .nav-link:hover,

    color: var(--bs-primary) !important;
}

}

    background-color: var(--bs-body-color) !important;
}

    border: 1px solid #fff;
}

// DIRECTORY: raggiesoft-assets
